response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and a strong background in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and technical leadership. While his experience with mobile platforms is limited, his work in geospatial tools, low-latency systems, and AI-agent infrastructure demonstrates relevant technical depth. His hands-on contributions to build systems and CI/CD (e.g., GitLab setup, Docker, CI servers) align well with the role’s focus on engineering productivity.
strengths: 15+ years of software development with deep technical expertise across multiple languages and domains
Proven experience in developer tooling, testing infrastructure, and CI/CD (e.g., GISCollective, MCP code generators, Selenium courses)
Strong technical leadership in cross-functional teams and mentorship (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Code Kata sessions)
concerns: Limited direct experience with mobile platforms (e.g., iOS/Android) or build systems for large-scale mobile ecosystems
No explicit experience leading organizational change or mid-to-senior team management in a structured engineering productivity role
Recent roles (e.g., re:cinq) focus more on AI-agent infrastructure than traditional developer tools or testing frameworks
